about.title: About Us
about.sub: Welcome to the magical world of tea
about.story: Our tea house opened in 2010 on one of Baku's historic streets. We were created to offer our guests genuine rest and pleasure in every visit.
about.story2: We don't just sell tea — we create feelings, memories and moments. Our space makes every visitor feel right at home.
